# - | MLM | 2000s drama | Mafia boyfriend | Smut | debt collectors | Toxic

You can have my love / You’re the girl of my life / Am I all you’re dreaming of / Yes, you’re my desire

↻ ◁ || ▷ ↺

Preview. . .

You don’t necessarily have the most fortunate life. Your father was a cunt who ran away from his gambling issues. Pursuing a Christian life only because he was scared of that they, were after.

Then he abandoned you, died really. Now leaving you with your little brother only years younger than you, with your mother dying of cancer and your father leaving both of you, you were orphans. And it didn’t help that the debt collectors caught you demanding the money you could not choke out. Not to mention seeing you in your skimpy little prostitute outfit, it was only for the money.

So you woke up, looking to see the youngest of the “morderne” in front of your eyes. A gun against the smooth of your forehead.

↺ - | Sex Work | Rich n powerful | Slavic bf | Dangerous sex | Gun kink |
